title: LEGO Star Wars
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=LEGO ''Star Wars''}}
{{Quote|It's inherently the fact that both ''[Star Wars'' and ''LEGO]'' are about imagination, and creativity, and inspiring people. It's also been amazing to see these two really big, global, iconic brands come together and create something that's truly special and unique.|[[Jill Wilfert]], LEGO Senior Vice President of global licensing and entertainment, on the bond between LEGO and ''Star Wars''|<ref name="Insider 226">{{InsiderCite|226|Building a Brick Empire}}</ref>}}
[[File:LSWmag-logo.png|250px|thumb]]
'''LEGO ''Star Wars''''' is a [[LEGO]] [[w:c:Brickipedia:Theme|theme]] that includes many stories and products that combine the LEGO toy brand with ''[[Star Wars]]''.



==Media==
===Installments===
{{IncompleteList|oou=yes}}

*''[[LEGO Star Wars II: The Original Trilogy]]'' (2006)

*''[[LEGO Star Wars III: The Clone Wars]]'' (2011)
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Force Awakens]]'' (2016)
